care.summary: Striking tropical with huge shield-like leaves; thrives in moist soil and warm humid conditions.
care.light: Bright indirect to partial shade; tolerates full sun with ample moisture
care.water: Keep soil consistently moist; can sit in shallow water like a marginal pond plant
care.soil: Rich, moisture-retentive loam or boggy soil; tolerates heavy clay
care.fertilizer: High-nitrogen liquid fertilizer monthly during growing season
care.toxicity: Toxic if eaten raw; corm must be cooked before consumption
common_issues: Yellowing leaves from underwatering or cold drafts
Leaf burn from direct midday sun without adequate soil moisture
tips: Grows well as a marginal pond plant or in water-logged containers
Mulch heavily in fall for overwintering in cooler zones
Harvest corms after leaves die back in autumn
